description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow should have two jobs: lint and test. The lint job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, sets up Python 3.11, installs dependencies, and runs lint checks. The test job runs on ubuntu-latest, depends on the lint job, and uses a matrix to test with Python 3.11 and 3.12. For each Python version, it checks out the code, sets up Python, installs dependencies, and runs tests.
